title: rosa afzeliana var. pastoralis
intro: Rosa afzeliana var. pastoralis, also known as the Pastoral Rose, is a variety of the Rosa afzeliana species, a type of climbing rose native to the Himalayas. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana var. pastoralis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic, while also supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
